regime_fall.current_status: Iran faces intensifying military pressure with simultaneous four-wave missile barrages into Israel and regional proxy attacks, while the regime exhibits severe internal fracturing between civilian and IRGC leadership, with Mojtaba Khamenei attempting to consolidate control through hardline appointments amid contradictory signals of both defiant military escalation and covert de-escalation negotiations as the April 6 Trump deadline approaches.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Trump announced intensified US strikes over 2-3 weeks following multiple Iranian missile barrages on Israel and regional targets, while simultaneous backchannel negotiations continue with Defense Secretary Hegseth confirming CENTCOM engagement showing lowest enemy launches in 24 hours, creating strategic ambiguity as Mojtaba Khamenei issues first public call for military resistance.
